title.zh: Royal Society 莱特希尔传记肖像
title.en: Royal Society memoir portrait of James Lighthill

notes.zh: MacTutor 将该图标注为 Royal Society obituary portrait，但其版权页说明图片原始来源未留存，无法保证权利状态。因此该图仅作低分辨率外部参考，公开发布前应取得授权或替换。
notes.en: MacTutor identifies this as a Royal Society obituary portrait, but its copyright page says original image provenance was not retained and rights cannot be guaranteed. It remains a low-resolution external reference pending permission or replacement before public release.

notes.zh: 原图来自爱丁堡大学 Donald Michie 个人档案，由 Austin Tate 教授维护；Wikimedia Commons 文件页确认 CC BY 4.0。
notes.en: The original comes from Donald Michie's University of Edinburgh archive curated by Professor Austin Tate; the Wikimedia Commons file page confirms CC BY 4.0.

title.zh: 1973 年 BBC 莱特希尔争议辩论档案

notes.zh: 爱丁堡大学档案注明辩论于 1973 年 6 月在英国皇家研究院举行，参与者包括莱特希尔、米奇、理查德·格雷戈里和约翰·麦卡锡。
notes.en: The University of Edinburgh archive states that the debate took place at the Royal Institution in June 1973 with Lighthill, Michie, Richard Gregory and John McCarthy.

title.zh: 英国皇家研究院演讲厅现代照片
title.en: Modern photograph of the Royal Institution Lecture Theatre

notes.zh: AnaConvTrans 摄于 2017 年；Wikimedia Commons 文件页标注 CC BY-SA 4.0。该图仅说明场地，不是 1973 年辩论现场照。
notes.en: Photographed by AnaConvTrans in 2017 and licensed CC BY-SA 4.0 on Wikimedia Commons. This illustrates the venue and is not a photograph of the 1973 debate.

title.zh: 爱丁堡 Freddy 机器人档案

notes.zh: 爱丁堡大学 AIAI 项目档案介绍 Freddy II，并说明米奇在 1973 年 BBC 莱特希尔争议辩论中通过视频展示该机器人；页面内容与图片采用 CC BY 4.0。
notes.en: The University of Edinburgh AIAI project archive documents Freddy II and states that Michie showed it by video during the 1973 BBC Lighthill controversy debate; page content and images are CC BY 4.0.
